* [new branch]      main       -> origin/main
⧗   input: refactor: Move the mounts and device colelction to InitialSetup
2026-07-17T16:00:45.2293681Z
Move the logic that gathers all needed devices and mounts for montor
execution environment in InitialSetup during "urunc create" and then
write the information to a file (monitor.json) which Exec will read and
apply the mounts, plus create the devices. THis is necessary for the
libcontianer refactor.
2026-07-17T16:00:45.2298154Z
One important note, we always include the /dev/net/tun device from
"urunc create" becaus ein that phsae we have no information about the
networking of the container. Therefore, we include the device and then
let Exec (which is part of "urunc reexec" and CNI hooks have been
executed) to choose if it will create or not the device.
2026-07-17T16:00:45.2302116Z

pr_info=$(gh pr view "${PR_NUMBER}" \

--json author,headRefName,baseRefName,url,commits,state,mergeCommit,baseRefOid,headRefOid)
author=$(jq -r '.author.login' <<< "$pr_info" |

head_ref=$(jq -r '.headRefName' <<< "$pr_info")
base_ref=$(jq -r '.baseRefName' <<< "$pr_info")
url=$(jq -r '.url' <<< "$pr_info")
merged=$(jq -r '.state' <<< "$pr_info")
if [[ "$merged" == "MERGED" ]]; then
merge_commit=$(jq -r '.mergeCommit.oid' <<< "$pr_info")
base_ref_oid=$(jq -r '.baseRefOid' <<< "$pr_info")
commits=$(gh api "repos/${REPO}/compare/${base_ref_oid}...${merge_commit}" \
--jq '.commits[].sha')
rebase_ref="$base_ref"
else
commits=$(jq -r '.commits[].oid' <<< "$pr_info")
rebase_ref="$head_ref"
fi
pr_reviews=$(gh api \
"repos/${REPO}/pulls/${PR_NUMBER}/reviews" \
--paginate)
reviewers=$(jq -r '[.[].user.login] | unique | .[]' <<< "$pr_reviews" |
sed 's/\[bot\]//g')
approvers=$(jq -r '
[map(select(.state == "APPROVED"))[].user.login] | unique | .[]
' <<< "$pr_reviews" | sed 's/\[bot\]//g')
{
echo "author=${author}"

echo "base-ref=${base_ref}"
echo "rebase-ref=${rebase_ref}"

echo "Rebase ref: ${rebase_ref}"
printf 'Commits:\n%s\n' "${commits}"

##[group]Run required=(
required=(

)
has_trailers=true
for sha in $COMMITS; do
msg=$(git show -s --format=%B "$sha")
trailers=$(echo "$msg" | git interpret-trailers --no-divider --parse)
for r in "${required[@]}"; do
if ! echo "$trailers" | grep -Eiq "^${r}:[[:space:]]+.+$"; then
echo "Commit ${sha} missing required trailer: ${r}"
has_trailers=false
fi
done
done
echo "has-trailers=${has_trailers}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
echo "PR has required trailers: ${has_trailers}"
if [[ "$FAIL_ON_MISSING" == 'true' ]] &&
[[ "$has_trailers" == 'false' ]]; then
echo "::error::Required trailers missing"
exit 1
fi

trailers=()
for i in $PR_REVIEWERS; do \
# Skip PR author and specified reviewers
if [[ "$i" == "$PR_AUTHOR" ]] || grep -qx "$i" <<< "$excluded"; then
echo "Skipping reviewer '${i}'"
continue
fi
gh_user=$(key="$i" yq '.users.[strenv(key)]' "$USER_INFO_PATH")
if [[ "$gh_user" == "null" ]]; then
gh_user=$(name="${i}[bot]" \
yq '.users.* | select(.name == strenv(name))' "$USER_INFO_PATH")
fi
if [[ -z "$gh_user" ]] || [[ "$gh_user" == "null" ]]; then
echo "::error::Reviewer '${i}' not found in user-info file"
exit 1
fi
gh_user_name=$(yq '.name' <<< "$gh_user")
gh_user_email=$(yq '.email' <<< "$gh_user")
trailers+=("review: ${gh_user_name} <${gh_user_email}>")
echo "Reviewer '$i' is '${gh_user_name} <${gh_user_email}>'"
done
if [[ ${#trailers[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
echo "::error::No reviewer trailers generated"
exit 1
fi
trailers_json=$(jq -nc '$ARGS.positional' --args "${trailers[@]}")
